name: Enhancement / Feature
about: New capability, refactor, or user-facing improvement
title: "feat: <short description>"
labels: [enhancement]
---

<!-- What will be possible after this ships that isn't today? -->

<!-- Why does this matter? What prompted it? Cite any plan spec under

<!-- Adjacent work that will NOT be included in this issue's PR(s). -->

-

criterion; "task ci green on a new e2e test asserting X" is. -->

- [ ]
